summary: Iteration 27 - Homepage UI/UX improvements and Custom Section editing testing COMPLETE. All features verified: reduced section spacing (py-12), custom section admin controls (image uploader, body text, body font controls), and custom section rendering without golden border.
critical_code_review_comments: All section components (AboutSection, SponsorSection, ProgramsSection, SessionsSection, TestimonialsSection, NewsletterSection, UpcomingProgramsSection) correctly use py-12 for reduced vertical spacing
CustomSection.jsx: Clean implementation with no golden/gold border styles - uses plain white background
HomepageSectionsTab.jsx: Properly renders ImageUploader, body_text textarea with markdown hint, and StyleCell for body_style when section.component === 'custom'
seed_data_creation: Created test custom section with title 'Test Custom Section' and body text with markdown formatting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom section feature fully functional. Admin can add custom sections with title, subtitle, image, body_text, and all font controls. Custom sections render on homepage without any golden border. All homepage sections use py-12 for reduced vertical spacing.

admin_homepage_sections_tab.navigation: PASS - Homepage sidebar item shows Homepage Sections tab
admin_homepage_sections_tab.section_rows: PASS - 8 section rows displayed with title/subtitle inputs and font controls

custom_section_admin_controls.image_uploader: PASS - 'Upload Image' and 'Use URL' buttons present with drag-drop area
custom_section_admin_controls.body_text_textarea: PASS - data-testid='body-text-custom_*' with markdown hint placeholder
custom_section_admin_controls.body_font_controls: PASS - StyleCell with color picker, font family, font size, bold (B), italic (I) buttons

custom_section_persistence.title_persistence: PASS - 'Test Custom Section' persisted after reload
custom_section_persistence.body_text_persistence: PASS - Markdown body text persisted after reload

custom_section_homepage_render.title_display: PASS - 'Test Custom Section' displayed in h2 heading
custom_section_homepage_render.body_text_display: PASS - Body text rendered with markdown (bold/italic)
custom_section_homepage_render.no_golden_border: PASS - borderBottomWidth: 0px, no gold color in computed styles

api_verification.get_settings: PASS - homepage_sections array contains custom section with all fields
api_verification.custom_section_fields: PASS - id, title, body_text, body_style, image_url all present
